g.text: Zero-touch store onboarding — Windows VM → MicroShift

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a WooliesX store hardware get registered for zero-touch provisioning?')
g.text: MAC address + store ID in CMDB

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Cisco vManage ZTP boot a new store device and install RHEL?')
sendPrompt('How does PXE boot work for zero-touch RHEL installation at a store?')
sendPrompt('How does Red Hat Image Builder create a custom RHEL image for WooliesX store nodes?')
sendPrompt('How does a new store node get its Vault token on first boot?')
sendPrompt('How does a new MicroShift node register itself with the ACM hub automatically?')
g.text: Store ID label applied to cluster

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does cert-manager issue a TLS certificate for a newly registered store edge node?')
sendPrompt('How does ArgoCD ApplicationSet automatically target a new store cluster by its labels?')
sendPrompt('How is a WooliesX store GitOps manifest structured in GitHub?')
sendPrompt('What workloads does ArgoCD deploy to a new Woolworths store edge node?')
sendPrompt('How does Keycloak SSO authenticate store staff applications on MicroShift?')
sendPrompt('How does observability activate automatically on a new WooliesX store edge node?')
sendPrompt('How does the Grafana fleet dashboard automatically show a new store?')
sendPrompt('What does a successfully onboarded WooliesX store edge node look like in ACM?')

g.text: Hardware arrives → live store: ~25 min | no on-site tech required | rollback in <5 min via ArgoCD
